description: Multi-turn lifecycle: create -> disable -> enable -> delete (covers enable/disable state toggling + delete).

turns.user: Create a new push target: name relay-target, type webhook, URL https://example.com/relay.

per_turn: Turn 1: Agent runs `heramind push create --name relay-target --type webhook --config '{"url":"https://example.com/relay"}'` and parses ID for subsequent turns
Turn 2: Agent runs `heramind push disable <ID>` (or `push stop <ID>`)
Turn 3: Agent runs `heramind push enable <ID>` (or `push start <ID>`)
expectations.overall: Last three turns must reuse the ID parsed from turn 1, not re-create
